description_long: This is a life-sized statue of a standing male figure dressed in formal historical attire, including a long coat and boots, positioned atop a large rectangular stone pedestal. The figure holds a rolled document in one hand and rests the other on his hip, exuding a sense of authority and composure. Draped over a support next to the figure is a cloth or cloak, adding visual interest and depth to the composition. The pedestal is robust and tiered, with an inscription visible on the front face, though the text is not fully legible. The sculpture appears to be cast in bronze, exhibiting a weathered greenish patina, while the pedestal is made of light-colored stone. The overall impression is one of commemoration, likely honoring a notable historical individual.
description: A life-sized bronze statue of a man in formal attire stands atop a large stone pedestal, holding a document and accompanied by a draped cloth. The sculpture is detailed and commemorative, with a weathered patina and inscribed base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full figure facing forward, with the document in hand and the inscription on the pedestal clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure, the draped cloth, and the depth of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the figure and the draped cloth, with no visible inscription.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile and the draped cloth from the opposite angle, with the pedestal's side visible.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is likely installed in an outdoor urban or park setting, as suggested by the large pedestal and commemorative style.
